message:
fix(core): unreachable code in σ70 promoter detection and search escaping

Two bugs found during code exploration:

1. transcription.ts: The `else if (score10 >= 0.9)` branch was unreachable
   because when score10 >= 0.9, the outer `if (score10 >= 0.8)` is already
   true, so the else clause never executes. Fixed by nesting the partial
   promoter detection inside the first if block, after checking for weak
   -35 box (best35 < 0.66).

2. bun-repository.ts: Search queries didn't escape backslash characters.
   Since `\` is used as the ESCAPE character in the LIKE clause, unescaped
   backslashes in user input (e.g. `foo\bar`) would be interpreted as escape
   sequences, causing incorrect search results. Fixed by adding `\\` to the
   regex character class, matching the SqlJsRepository implementation.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
